title: Hard Disk & NTFS Layout
overview: 1. Partitions - A disk can be divided into one or more partitions. - Example diagram partitions: 1. MBR (Master Boot Record) 2. First‑Partition Boot Sector 3. Filesystem (metadata) area of 1st partition 4. Data area of 1st partition
